title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
